value.found_quote: To load those connectors alongside the servers in `managed-mcp.json`, set `"allowAllClaudeAiMcps": true` in a [managed settings source](/en/admin-setup#decide-how-settings-reach-devices). Requires Claude Code v2.1.149 or later.
value.name: Allow claude.ai connectors alongside the managed set via allowAllClaudeAiMcps
